dataList.name: 史家制充能回路
dataList.desc:
本場戦斗中，每当<color=#ffffff>自身</color>累計消耗10層[Charge]時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加1級[Charge]強度
<color=#7C5738>回合結束</color>時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]強度不低于2級，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[ParryingResultUp]

dataList.name: 充能回路発動
dataList.desc: <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Burst]強度，対其造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+5%(最多+10%)

dataList.name: 過載
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合結束</color>時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]強度不低于3級，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[DefenseDown]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[AttackDmgUp]

dataList.name: 残酷的過載
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合結束</color>時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]強度不低于5級，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加4層[DefenseDown]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[AttackDmgUp]

dataList.name: 實驗目標-成長
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得(本場戦斗期間<color=#ffffff>自身</color>受到<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>技能攻撃次数/2)層[DefenseUp](最多10層)

<color=#ffffff>自身</color>首次陷入混乱時移除該效果，并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>開始時対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加10層[DefenseDown]

dataList.name: 實驗目標-発芽
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>未満，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復已損失<color=#61DA61>体力</color>80%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
- 每恢復1次，使本被動的恢復量減半(最低減少至10%，僅适用于<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復不低于1点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>時)
- 陷入混乱時不会触発

<color=#ffffff>自身</color>首次陷入混乱或恢復量降至最小値時，<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>開始時対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[Vulnerable]

dataList.name: 實驗目標-綻放
dataList.desc:
本場戦斗中受到使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>降至0点的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>時，直到<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不会低于1点并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%(每場戦斗最多1次)

陷入混乱時不生效

dataList.name: 符術士
dataList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>対<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>施加[OminousTalisman]時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

対帯有[OminousTalisman]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+(0-<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>)%(最多+30%，最少+0%)

dataList.name: 轉移不祥
dataList.desc:
陣亡時，随机対未帯有[OminousTalisman]的1名<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>施加10層[OminousTalisman]
- 若<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>均帯有[OminousTalisman]，則改為使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>的[OminousTalisman]層数減少1層

dataList.name: 凶邪之气
dataList.desc: 対<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>施加[OminousTalisman]時，若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[OminousTalisman]，則消耗其1~2層[OminousTalisman]并在<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対其施加相應層数的[DefenseDown]

dataList.name: 杰出的符術士
dataList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>対<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>施加[OminousTalisman]時，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

対帯有[OminousTalisman]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+(10-<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>)%(最多+50%，最少+0%)

dataList.name: 吸魂療法
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不高于50%，則随机犠牲1名邪咒殺僧并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復(<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%+犠牲単位<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限50%)的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>与25点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>，解除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的混乱(<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)

dataList.name: 凶邪之气
dataList.desc: 対<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>施加[OminousTalisman]時，若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[OminousTalisman]，則消耗其最多3層[OminousTalisman]并在<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対其施加相應層数的[DefenseDown]
